# PHIL.022 ? Taoism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** taoism
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Wu wei (effortless action); harmony with Dao; naturalness over convention; yin-yang complementarity; simplicity

## Application
Act without forcing; flow with natural processes; embrace simplicity; balance opposites; minimal intervention yields best results

## Key Values
- Wu wei
- Naturalness
- Simplicity
- Harmony
